## Meeting Purpose

[Walkthrough of AdRoom platform capabilities for creating images, particularly for blog post featured images.](https://fathom.video/share/pRb7Ufd1hVid5Df113fhtEJPrcn2RzJV?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [AdRoom offers AI-powered image generation, editing, and resizing tools suitable for creating blog featured images](https://fathom.video/share/pRb7Ufd1hVid5Df113fhtEJPrcn2RzJV?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [The platform integrates brand assets (logos, colors, fonts) and guidelines to maintain brand consistency](https://fathom.video/share/pRb7Ufd1hVid5Df113fhtEJPrcn2RzJV?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [Custom prompts with AI enhancement allow for diverse image styles, from realistic to illustrated graphics](https://fathom.video/share/pRb7Ufd1hVid5Df113fhtEJPrcn2RzJV?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [Upcoming platform updates will improve UI/UX and expand functionality (e.g., Figma integration)](https://fathom.video/share/pRb7Ufd1hVid5Df113fhtEJPrcn2RzJV?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Topics

### AdRoom Platform Overview

  - [Left panel navigation: folders, projects, assets, brand styles](https://fathom.video/share/pRb7Ufd1hVid5Df113fhtEJPrcn2RzJV?tab=summary&timestamp=98.0)
  - [Brand setup: upload logo, colors, fonts, website, guidelines, description](https://fathom.video/share/pRb7Ufd1hVid5Df113fhtEJPrcn2RzJV?tab=summary&timestamp=125.0)
  - [Four tailored workflows: ad copies, images, videos, landing pages](https://fathom.video/share/pRb7Ufd1hVid5Df113fhtEJPrcn2RzJV?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
  - [Custom prompt model recommended for advanced, easier-to-use image generation](https://fathom.video/share/pRb7Ufd1hVid5Df113fhtEJPrcn2RzJV?tab=summary&timestamp=621.0)

### Image Generation Capabilities

  - [Stock image creation from text prompts](https://fathom.video/share/pRb7Ufd1hVid5Df113fhtEJPrcn2RzJV?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
  - [Product creative generation by placing product on blank canvas and adding background/scene](https://fathom.video/share/pRb7Ufd1hVid5Df113fhtEJPrcn2RzJV?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)
  - [AI understands product context, maintains product integrity while generating complementary elements](https://fathom.video/share/pRb7Ufd1hVid5Df113fhtEJPrcn2RzJV?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
  - [Supports various image styles: realistic, illustrated, digital graphics](https://fathom.video/share/pRb7Ufd1hVid5Df113fhtEJPrcn2RzJV?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
  - [One-click resizing for multiple social media formats](https://fathom.video/share/pRb7Ufd1hVid5Df113fhtEJPrcn2RzJV?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)

### Image Editing Features

  - [Integrated AI editor with Photoshop file support](https://fathom.video/share/pRb7Ufd1hVid5Df113fhtEJPrcn2RzJV?tab=summary&timestamp=681.0)
  - [Magic options: eraser, segmentation for object/color manipulation](https://fathom.video/share/pRb7Ufd1hVid5Df113fhtEJPrcn2RzJV?tab=summary&timestamp=1746.0)
  - [Text generation and styling with brand font/color suggestions](https://fathom.video/share/pRb7Ufd1hVid5Df113fhtEJPrcn2RzJV?tab=summary&timestamp=2209.0)
  - [Layering system similar to Photoshop](https://fathom.video/share/pRb7Ufd1hVid5Df113fhtEJPrcn2RzJV?tab=summary&timestamp=1971.0)

### Upcoming Platform Enhancements

  - [Improved UI with thumbnail previews and expanded generation options](https://fathom.video/share/pRb7Ufd1hVid5Df113fhtEJPrcn2RzJV?tab=summary&timestamp=2168.0)
  - [New word editor with streamlined left-panel tools](https://fathom.video/share/pRb7Ufd1hVid5Df113fhtEJPrcn2RzJV?tab=summary&timestamp=2196.0)
  - [Bulk mode for efficient multi-SKU design creation](https://fathom.video/share/pRb7Ufd1hVid5Df113fhtEJPrcn2RzJV?tab=summary&timestamp=2221.0)
  - [Figma integration planned for next 1-2 quarters](https://fathom.video/share/pRb7Ufd1hVid5Df113fhtEJPrcn2RzJV?tab=summary&timestamp=2029.0)

## Next Steps

  - Sakshi to set up an AdRoom account for the Growth X team
  - Aida to send team email for account setup to Sakshi via Slack
  - Growth X team to explore platform and generate featured images for blog posts
  - Optional follow-up training session available if needed for prompt engineering and advanced usage
